subject: New Task Assigned: API Integration
body:
A new task has been assigned to you in Jira: 'Integrate Payment Gateway API'.

Priority: High
Due Date: Tomorrow

Please check the dashboard for details.

subject: Feedback on Design Mockups
body:
I've reviewed the latest UI mockups. The color scheme looks great, but the navigation flow feels a bit clunky on mobile.

Can we discuss this afternoon?

subject: Meeting: Sprint Planning scheduled for 10:00 AM
body:
Team,

Just a reminder that we have our sprint planning session at 10:00 AM in Conference Room B (and via Zoom).

Please review the backlog beforehand.

Best,
Team Lead

subject: Lunch & Learn: AI Ethics
body:
Join us this Friday at 12 PM for a Lunch & Learn session on 'The Ethics of AI in 2026'.

Pizza will be provided!

RSVP by Thursday.

subject: Client Meeting Rescheduled
body:
The meeting with Arasaka Corp has been moved to 3 PM due to a conflict.

Updated calendar invite attached.

subject: Server Alert: High Latency Detected
body:
Warning: High latency detected on the Asia-Pacific region load balancer.

Response time > 500ms.

Please investigate immediately.

subject: Action Required: Complete Security Training
body:
Dear Employee,

This is a reminder to complete your mandatory cybersecurity awareness training by Friday.

Failure to complete this may result in account suspension.

Regards,
HR

subject: Urgent: Q4 Report Revision
body:
Hi,

The client requested some changes to the financial section of the Q4 report. We need this updated before the 2 PM meeting.

Please prioritize this.

Thanks,
PM
